title: Lead Instructional Designer at MT Educare

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at MT Educare
jsonLd.description:
Join the MT Educare family as a Instructional Designer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
